description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical black top hat with a flat crown and a wide, flat brim. The hat's surface appears to be made of a textured fabric, likely felt or wool, giving it a matte and slightly rough appearance. On one side, there is a prominent red fabric patch sewn onto the crown with visible white cross-stitching, adding a touch of character and suggesting repair or customization. The brim is octagonal rather than perfectly round, giving the hat a slightly stylized, geometric look. The interior is likely hollow, designed to fit comfortably on a person's head. The overall style is reminiscent of classic Victorian or magician's top hats, but the patch gives it a more urban, worn, or whimsical feel.
description: A tall, black top hat with a flat crown, wide brim, and a red stitched patch on one side. The hat has a textured, matte fabric surface and an octagonal brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain black surface of the hat with no visible decorations.
description_view_1: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the plain black crown and brim, still without visible embellishments.
description_view_2: Side view revealing the edge of a red patch with white stitching, partially visible on the right side of the crown.
description_view_3: Full view of the red fabric patch with white cross-stitching, prominently displayed on the side of the crown.
